thoughts.thought: [First Principles] Regarding "Build an AI-powered learning platform": Break down to the most fundamental truths. What are the irreducible components? Domain lens (technology): consider automation.
[Inversion] Regarding "Build an AI-powered learning platform": Invert the problem. What would make this definitely fail? Now avoid those things. Domain lens (technology): consider data.
[Analogy] Regarding "Build an AI-powered learning platform": What does this resemble in nature, history, or another domain? Apply that structure. Domain lens (technology): consider ai.

[Systems Thinking] Regarding "Build an AI-powered learning platform": What are the feedback loops? What inputs, outputs, and unintended consequences exist? Domain lens (technology): consider network effect.
[Opportunity Cost] Regarding "Build an AI-powered learning platform": What are you giving up by pursuing this? What else could those resources achieve? Domain lens (technology): consider scalability.

goal: Build an AI-powered personalised learning platform that adapts to each student
